title: Azumanga-Craft
description: Azumanga-craft is a mod that adds a lot of things related to Azumanga Daioh and the anime world
body:
### Azumanga-Craft!

**IMPORTANT: Version 3.0 is not compatible with previous versions because they do not share the same base, sorry for the inconvenience!**

Azumanga - craft is a Forge mod for version 1.20.1 that adds a lot of things related to Azumanga Daioh and the anime world in general.
- Food and new preparations
- Animals and plants
- Biomes
- New profession for villagers
- Plushies, paintings and more
